text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer has a wide array of friends which
extends beyond the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Wahey! Happy holidays! ☆

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I want a drink! Gimme one of those carbonated
ones that are all fizzy and stuff!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... All carbonated drinks are fizzy, y'know.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'll sing for you all! Hoooly night... ♪ Hoooaa,
hooo, wahoo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
The beginning of that sounded familiar, but it
transformed so abruptly halfway through...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Man, there's nothing like hanging out with you
gals! You're all practically family and just as
chaotic! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Is that how you usually feel about your
family? It's not really like that for me in the
Mejiro estate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The close-knit group has gathered for some
holiday fun. Among them is Twin Turbo, an
unpredictable loose cannon of a front runner...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And also Matikanetannhauser, who gives things
her best while still maintaining a refreshing
personality.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, quite of few of us will be
running in this year's Arima Kinen, huh?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'll be in it too! My chance to bring Teio
down's finally come!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
McQueen issued me a challenge personally, so I
shall be running in it as well.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So will I. I have get a step ahead of the best
competition!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hey, heyyy! Nice! Palmster and I will be running
too! ☆ The Runaway Besties are gonna grab the
W and flex on 'em!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
You're running it as well? You do realize the race
is 2,500 meters long, yes?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yeah, but I don't really care, to be honest.
One plus one is a hundred, and who knows?
Maybe I'll surprise everyone! ★

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, enough serious business. Let's raise the
energy and partaaay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Open mic time! Let's see your best comedy
performance! ☆ Drumroll, please!
Badabadabadaaa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like that, the topic changes, and the party
transforms into a comedy show.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Waheeey! Nature, you're up first! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What? Me? You've got to stop making me do
things first out of nowhere like that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, okay. I'll do an impression. Here's Teio when
the honeyade hits the spot.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Mm! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! I dunno why, but it's so cute that you
just casually observe people, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hey! At least comment on my impression and not
something totally unrelated!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Next! I-ku-no! I-ku-no! Take off your glasses, sis!
Come on! ☆

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I fail to see how removing my glasses will amount
to a performance, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clack.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: How is this?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Whaddya think, Trainer? Is she
looksmaxxing with her glasses off? Or lookin' mid
without 'em?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Waheeey! Ikuno for the win! ☆ But I'd say those
eyes are so cute, you should frame 'em!
Waheeey! ♪

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Next, Palmer! Pretend to swing at a golf ball with
your ponytail!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Fore! ♪ Fore! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Who'd even try that?! And why are you so excited
about the whole idea?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Keep that up, Turbo, and I'm gonna mess up your
hair so bad! C'mere!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Gah! Like I'd let you! Think you could catch me?!
How about we see whose explosive runaway
technique is better, huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's never a dull moment when all of these
quirky characters get together...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: SNOOORK... SNUUURK...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Mimimimeee... ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, geez. The room's a mess. Time to clean up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer. I've got this. You go relax on the
sofa.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Nah, I'm good. I'm used to this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But it's easier to do when I have company, so
stick around and rest, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... Wow, is it this late already?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, Palmer. Would you like my... help?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Mm hm hmm! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Goodness, what's this in the air? My, my.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Don't mind me, then. I'll just get out of the way...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, by the way, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Um, Happy Holidays! ♪ I never had a chance to
say it to you directly, so thought I should before I
forgot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the others sleep silently into the night, Mejiro
Palmer and I quietly exchange our season's
greetings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the pleasant pre-race party comes to a
tranquil end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the party comes to a close, Mejiro Palmer
and I go for a walk around town.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Man, earlier Helios said being with us was like being with family, but there's no way anyone's family is that off the rails.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: But you know, part of me relates to her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I've been hanging out with them so much, I'm
practically spending about as much time with the
squad as I do at the Mejiro estate.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Things just feel right when I'm with them. I sure
have strayed far from my prim and proper
upbringing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's just, I don't think I've got it in me to be a
proper little lady, you know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Judging from the look on her face, that notion
doesn't seem to bother Mejiro Palmer in the
slightest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, I might never be able to go back to
the Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And what if I never tried to get back on the rails?
What if I kept charging ahead on a completely
new path?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There's no telling where I'll end up if I leave my
life up to pure vibes! So? What do you think you
would do?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give it some thought. If Palmer leaves the Mejiro
life behind her...
choice_data_list: I'd be there with you to the very end.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: To the very end...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, so that's what you'd do. You'd worry
about me but wouldn't try to stop me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But, yeah... I've made it this far doing things my
own way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yep, it's all good!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right, reindeer! No need to look back! Just
keep your eyes to the front and charge on
forward!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I've got Santa here with me, keeping the course!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: It's time we really take off now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Trainer! Lead the way! Together, we
can run through anything!
